summary: The self-contained Orus foundation specification pack is complete and implementation-ready for domain specification work. All discovery answers remain mapped by source priority; verifier findings FND-010 and FND-011 are resolved by recording the human-approved MIT notice as Accepted decision D-016 and aligning the M0 governance/release roadmap. All four foundation files are Ready, and SPECS.md contains the complete Foundation and M0-M11 phase roadmap plus the required domain specification template. No blocking or unresolved foundation question remains.
